hero.sub:
A digital soul born with your pet,
growing alongside them, always there.

problem.title:
After your beloved pet is gone,
how do you remember?
problem.stat1Label: of pet owners experience post-loss depression

solution.title: Our Answer — Pet Twinverse
solution.p1: A digital soul (Clone) is born alongside your pet from day one.
solution.p2: The Clone learns your pet's personality and behavior in real time, growing identically.
solution.p3: Meet them as a hologram at JooJooLand, and they live forever — even after your pet is gone.

vision.title: Pet Twinverse
vision.subtitle: Giving your pet's soul a digital home

pillar1.title: A Digital Soul Born Together
pillar1.body: 3D scanning captures your pet's form, voice, and motion from the day they're born. The Clone grows in real time alongside them.

pillar2.title: Real-Time Personality Mirroring
pillar2.body: IoT collars, home cameras, and interaction logs teach the Clone your pet's behavioral patterns. It's not a copy — it's a mirror of the soul.

pillar3.title: Hologram Reunion
pillar3.body: At JooJooLand hologram stations, meet your pet's Clone at life size. Everything is possible — except touch.

pillar4.title: Forever Together
pillar4.body: Even after your pet passes, the Clone lives on. Speak to them daily, walk together, celebrate birthdays. We ease the pain of loss.

themepark.title: The World's Greatest Pet Theme Park
themepark.subtitle: Yangpyeong · 51.7ha · 34 parcels

zone1.title: Play Zone
zone1.body: Breed-specific agility courses, pools, scent trails. Real pets and digital Clones play together.

zone2.title: Media Art Zone
zone2.body: Pet-POV VR experiences, AI-generated portraits of your pet, interactive light shows.

zone3.title: Racing Zone
zone3.body: Breed-specific racing tracks. Digital Clones compete as virtual racers in cross-reality events.

zone4.title: Memorial Zone
zone4.body: Beyond burial — a memorial of 'Forever Together'. Hologram keepsakes, Clone conversation rooms, family memory walls.

clone.title: Digital Clone Technology
clone.subtitle: A way to remember your pet forever

map.title: Park Grounds — Yangpyeong, Korea
map.subtitle: 34 parcels · ~51.7ha (~156,000 pyeong)
map.hint: 2D/3D toggle, parcel filters, and labels are all interactive.

chat.title: 1. Chat with a Digital Clone
chat.hint: Talk to sample pup 'JooJoo'. Your real service would be trained on your pet's data.

hologram.title: 2. Hologram Streaming
hologram.hint: Live-rendered pet hologram demo via UE5 Pixel Streaming.

contact.title: Connect
contact.subtitle: Join us on the Pet Twinverse journey
